response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the job requirements. They also have experience with AI agent development and various other technologies relevant to the role.
concerns: Less direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Some technologies mentioned are not directly aligned with the primary stack
Lack of specific examples of work with relational/NoSQL databases

key_factors.factor: Less direct experience with primary stack
